MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Dismissal And Correcting Record.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for order setting aside and vacating dismissal and correcting record" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
